mapper.sql: bt.id, bt.engineer_id, bt.project_id, bt.task_id, bt.origin, bt.destination, bt.start_date, bt.end_date, bt.transport_mode, bt.accommodation, bt.estimated_cost, bt.actual_cost, bt.reason, bt.status, bt.approver_id, bt.approve_time, bt.remark, bt.create_time, e.name AS engineer_name, p.project_name AS project_name, approver.real_name AS approver_name
mapper.select: SELECT FROM business_trip bt LEFT JOIN engineer e ON e.id = bt.engineer_id AND e.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN project p ON p.id = bt.project_id AND p.deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN sys_user approver ON approver.id = bt.approver_id AND approver.deleted = 0 WHERE bt.id = #{id} AND bt.deleted = 0
